positive: Minimalist cosmic whale silhouette breaching through stardust rings and geometric celestial formations. The whale is composed of deep indigo and silver nebula gas, contrasted against a stark, vibrant cyan and magenta gradient background. The composition is centered, with strong negative space to accommodate text placement. Style: Clean, ethereal vector illustration meets modern graphic design. Lighting: High contrast, neon luminescence effect. Focus on sharp edges and defined outlines suitable for screen printing or embroidery. High resolution, perfect for apparel art.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermarks, text, low resolution, bad anatomy, messy, complex background, photorealistic, gradient noise, busy, messy lines
